title: Regulatory Alignment
description: All actors must operate within the boundaries set by the Regulator and applicable law.

title: Platform Access Rule
description: Defines conditions under which actors may access core platform orchestration services.

title: Marketplace Fairness Rule
description: Ensures non-discriminatory matching of supply and demand within the marketplace.

title: Governance Role Assignment
description: Every governance role must be assigned to an accountable actor at all times.

title: Customer Protection Rule
description: Protects customers from unfair contractual or service terms.

title: Dispute Escalation Rule
description: Defines the escalation path for unresolved inter-actor disputes.

title: Independent Audit Rule
description: Requires periodic independent governance and compliance audits.

title: Data Sovereignty Rule
description: Mandates data residency, access control and sovereignty-compliant handling.

title: Quality Certification Rule
description: Requires manufacturing quality certification before capacity is listed.

title: Interoperability Standard Rule
description: Requires adherence to shared technical and data interoperability standards.

title: Circularity & Sustainability Rule
description: Requires end-of-life material recovery and circular closure reporting.

title: Workforce Qualification Rule
description: Requires minimum workforce skills and training certification.

title: Cyber-Resilience Rule
description: Requires baseline cybersecurity controls across platform-critical actors.

title: Capacity Redundancy Rule
description: Requires qualification of alternate capacity providers to avoid single points of failure.
